title: fragaria viridis var. bifera
intro: Fragaria viridis var. bifera, also known as the green strawberry, is a type of plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which have been used to treat various health issues due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fragaria viridis var. bifera include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparation of this plant can be made into a tea by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water, or it can be used as a tincture or capsule supplement, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
